calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to APR-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
